prompt: Set up cwmem in this project so we can start tracking architectural decisions.

assertions.name: asks-questions-first
assertions.description: Asks the user clarifying questions before blindly running init

assertions.name: runs-init
assertions.description: Uses 'cwmem init' to initialize the repository

assertions.name: offers-entity-creation
assertions.description: Offers to create initial entities after init

assertions.name: resolves-command
assertions.description: Determines how to run cwmem (uvx, uv run, or direct PATH)
